channel.title: 代码片段 on 记录生活，记录爱
channel.description: Recent content in 代码片段 on 记录生活，记录爱

item.title: Golang Gin创建假的Context
item.description: urlParameter := &url.Values{} query := map[string]string{ "relation_id": "1098963", "source": "alliance", "platform": "shell", "channel": "3", "house_code": "101104214655", "work_code": "vdrj5DR7PGW3q8Oe", "user_id": "0", } for key, value := range query { urlParameter.Set(key, value) } ctx.Request, _ = http.NewRequest("GET", "http://localhost:9200/house/card/show.json", strings.NewReader(urlParameter.Encode())) ctx.Request.Header = http.Header(map[string][]string{ "User-Agent": {"PostmanRuntime/7.26.8"}, })

item.title: golang程序下载图片到本地
item.description: package main import ( "fmt" "io/ioutil" "net/http" "regexp" "strings" //"io" "os" //"sync" ) var downloadDir = "./upload/iloli" func checkDownloadDir() { _, err := os.Stat(downloadDir) if os.IsNotExist(err) { os.MkdirAll(downloadDir, 0777) os.Chmod(downloadDir, 0777) } } func main() { checkDownloadDir() l := getMDList(`./content`) allImages := map[string]bool{} for _, f := range l { images := parseImage(f) for _, i := range images { allImages[i] = true } } /* wg := &sync.WaitGroup{} wg.
